title: Regional Business Development Manager – Printing Solutions
description:
Overview:
We are seeking an experienced Regional Sales Manager to lead the Corporate and Government Sales division across Southeast Asia. The successful candidate will drive regional growth strategies, establish sales excellence frameworks, and build a high-performing team to strengthen the company’s presence in the corporate and government sectors.


Key Responsibilities:


Regional Strategy & Growth

  • Develop and execute regional go-to-market strategies for corporate and government sectors, aligning with overall business objectives.
  • Drive market expansion across Southeast Asia, identifying new territories and key opportunities.
  • Build a robust and sustainable sales pipeline across markets.

Performance Management

  • Set and oversee sales targets and KPIs for all country teams.
  • Conduct monthly, quarterly, and annual business reviews to ensure consistent performance achievement.

Sales Excellence & Enablement

  • Establish a unified sales playbook and ensure consistent CRM and sales methodologies across countries.
  • Promote best practice sharing to strengthen regional sales capabilities.

Leadership & Talent Development

  • Coach and mentor country heads to close skill gaps and improve performance.
  • Build succession pipelines and develop regional sales leaders.

Stakeholder Collaboration

  • Partner with business units to align product strategies with client needs.
  • Collaborate with support functions to ensure compliant, efficient sales operations.

Qualifications:

  • Bachelor’s Degree in Business, Marketing, or related field.
  • 10+ years in B2B hardware sales with 5+ years of regional leadership experience.
  • Proven success managing multi-country teams in corporate and government markets.
  • Strong strategic, analytical, and cross-cultural leadership skills.
  • Excellent communication and stakeholder management abilities.

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. All applications will be handled confidentially. By submitting your application, you agree to the collection, use, retention, and disclosure of your personal information to prospective employers.

Wecruit Pte Ltd

EA License No: 20C0270

Wecruit is one of the leading recruitment firms based in Singapore, dedicated to helping job seekers find the right career opportunities.


We partner with reputable companies across a wide range of industries, including Healthcare, IT, Corporate Support, Engineering, Education, Logistics & Supply Chain, Oil & Gas, and Maritime. 


Whether you're looking for permanent roles or short-term assignments, our consultants take the time to understand your experience, preferences, and goals to match you with suitable roles.

With over 1,000 successful placements and a strong track record of candidate satisfaction, Wecruit is here to support your career journey.


Let us help you take the next step—reach out to explore current opportunities or to speak with our team.
